title: Graph Coloring Constraint Satisfaction Dataset with Parameterized Difficulty
summary: Demo notebook for the Graph Coloring Constraint Satisfaction Dataset. Loads a curated 10-example subset spanning difficulty levels 1-20, explores the data structure, verifies all colorings using an exact backtracking solver, regenerates 400 new problems across all 20 difficulty levels (full original parameters), and visualizes a sample graph coloring alongside the difficulty progression (nodes/edges vs level). Runs in ~2m10s. Uses networkx for graph operations and matplotlib for visualization.
